title: Velvety Floral Spanish Kidney Toast
description: A romantic, nut‑free Spanish dish featuring silky beef kidney, fragrant saffron, and toasted bread, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic, sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the white wine and simmer until reduced by half, about 4 minutes.
Add the beef broth, smoked paprika, and saffron water; bring to a gentle boil.
Add sliced kidney, season with salt and pepper, and cook for 5–7 minutes until the kidneys are tender but still firm.
Stir in lemon zest, lemon juice, and chopped parsley; remove from heat.
Toast the bread slices until golden and crisp.
Top each slice with a generous amount of the kidney mixture.
Serve immediately while the toast is still warm.
Pair with a glass of dry Spanish sherry for a complete date‑night experience.
